# HTML + Bento

Coming soon. Ultra-lightweight Bento design with zero JavaScript framework.

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|------------|
| Framework | Vanilla HTML/JS |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL) |
| Auth | Supabase Auth |

## Status

🔜 In development. Star the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/FaizyabHussain07/slik-engine) to get notified.
